chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-749 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA 5999/2024. 3. For hearing of main case 12.08.2024. Shaikh Ikram Aziz, Advocate for petitioner Respondent in person. = This petition is filed against order dated 30.05.2024, whereby Family Judge has allowed meeting of minor son of respondent, father with him on 2nd dayof Eid ul Azha from 12.00 pm to 6.00 p.m. The time of Eid ul Azha has already elapsed and no further directions have been issued by the Family Court on the point, therefore, this petition apparently become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. However, both the parties are at liberty to approach the family court for the purpose of taking or regulating custody of minor or visiting rights. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE A.K
